---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new feature or improvement
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

A clear and concise description of the feature you're proposing.

## Motivation

Why is this feature needed? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed Design

Describe the proposed behavior. If this involves a CLI command, include example usage:

```
skillrelay <command> [options]
```

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative approaches you considered and why you prefer this one.

## Additional Context

Add any other context, diagrams, or references here.
